component.name: MainScene
component.script: sub init() ' Mirrors how rokucommunity/promises registers a callback: it identifies an anonymous ' function by the name reported by toStr() and passes that name to observeField. cb = sub(event as object) print "OBSERVER FIRED" end sub name = cb.toStr().tokenize(" ").peek() timer = createObject("roSGNode", "Timer") timer.duration = 0.01 timer.repeat = false m.timer = timer ok = timer.observeFieldScoped("fire", name) print "observe ok="; ok timer.control = "start" end sub
